title: 5. Points for Nasolabial Folds and Marionette Lines
text:
Area around the mouth and the nose
~ !  ~
87
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
~ !  ~
88
Muscles pulling upper lips up
①Levator Labii Superioris *2
②Levator Anguli Oris *2
Muscles pulling lower lips down
③Depressor Labii Inferioris *2
④Depressor Anguli Oris *2
⓶
⓷
⓸
⓵
MUSCLES RELATED TO
NASOLABIAL FOLDS,
MARIONETTE LINES, AND CHIN LINES
There  are  four  muscles  (eight  when  both  sides
combined)  around  the  lips.  Two  muscles  with  the
levator~,  which  elevate  the  upper  lips,  and  two
muscles with the depressor~, which pull the lower
lips down. Each pair of muscles are doing the same
work.
The  muscles  with  the  anguli~  (angle)  are
connected to the end of lips, and the muscles with
labii~ are connected to the upper/lower lips.
When  the  muscles  with  “the  levator  labii
(mouth)~” are contracted, your mouth will be shaped
like below.
When  the  muscles  with  “the  levator  anguli
(angle)~" are contracted, your mouth will be shaped
like below.
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
~ !  ~
89
⓵ Zygomaticus Major *2
⓶ Zygomaticus Minor *2
⓵
⓶
MUSCLES RELATED TO
NASOLABIAL FOLDS
The zygomaticus major and minor are other
muscles that elevate the end of lips like the
levator anguli oris and of the upper lip like the
levator  labii  superioris.  But  the  direction  is
different.  These  muscles  start  from  the
zygomatic  bone,  and  the  zygomaticus  major
ﬁnishes at the end of lip while the zygomaticus
minor ﬁnishes at the skin of the upper lip. A
contraction  of  the  zygomaticus  major  and
minor pulls the end of lips to up and away from
the mouth, making a happy smile. Therefore,
the  zygomaticus  major  and  minor  are  also
called as the smiling muscles.
Many  other  muscles  like  the  levator  labii
superioris,  the  levator  anguli  oris,  and  the
risorius are involved in smiling as well.
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
Nasolabial folds
The contraction of the levator labii superioris alaeque nasi, the levator labii superioris,
and the zygomaticus minor make the nasolabial folds, and the nasolabial folds us look
cynical. Cynical expression makes the nasolabial folds, and the nasolabial folds make us look
more cynical. It is a vicious cycle. Right, these wrinkles are deeply related to habitual facial
expression. Patients with deep nasolabial folds have tightened those muscles.  LI-20 and ST-3
are very good points to release the muscles and help circulation around the wrinkle lines.
Therefore, insert the needles at these points with perpendicular angle targeting the tightened
muscles, and insert the needles on the site of nasolabial folds with transverse angle making
micro trauma under the wrinkles which are already formed.
